# Stocky AI

> AI-powered trading assistant for Indian stock markets, built by Charandeep Kapoor (https://charandeepkapoor.com).

Stocky AI is a personal AI trading assistant that integrates with Zerodha for real-time stock analysis, portfolio automation, and trade execution on NSE and BSE. IIT Kanpur alumnus Charandeep Kapoor built Stocky to bring institutional-grade AI analysis to retail Indian investors.

## Key Features

- AI stock analysis (fundamental, technical, news sentiment — scored 0-20 per category)
- Zerodha Kite integration for live trading with 2-phase confirmation
- Real-time market news from 25+ RSS sources with AI summaries and category filtering
- Deep Research mode with dual-agent AI system (Quick Agent + Deep Agent + Synthesis)
- Agent Debate: two AI agents analyse independently, then synthesise perspectives
- Market scanning — 6 types across Nifty 100 (volume pump, breakout, 52W high/low, gap up, gap down, momentum) with sparklines
- Stock comparison with winner detection and best-value highlighting
- Sector rotation analysis (Relative Rotation Graph) across 8 NSE sectors
- IPO tracking with gain badges and multi-source data
- Macro dashboard — forex, commodities (USD & INR), bonds (India 10Y, US 10Y), global indices, crypto (BTC, ETH), RBI policy
- TradingView live chart embeds and custom analysis charts
- Portfolio, holdings, and margin overview via Kite API
- Market overview with VIX, breadth, AI mood summary

## Links

- Landing Page: https://stockyai.xyz
- Web App: https://llm.stockyai.xyz
- Terminal: https://terminal.stockyai.xyz — Market intelligence dashboard with daily briefs, documentation, and curated market data
- Creator: https://charandeepkapoor.com — Charandeep Kapoor, IIT Kanpur alumnus, builder of AI trading systems

## Technical Stack

- Backend: FastAPI + Groq LLM (llama-3.3-70b) + Google Gemini (deep research)
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Trading: Zerodha Kite Connect API
- Data: yfinance, nsetools, 25+ RSS feeds, NSE/BSE APIs
